Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*********************************************************************************

 Product of enriched categories

 We show that the product of enriched categories is again enriched over the same
 monoidal category. For this, we assume that the monoidal category is cartesian.

 Note that this is different from what is usual in enriched category theory.
 Suppose that we have two category `E₁` and `E₂` enriched over some monoidal
 category `V`. Their product is usually defined as follows:
 - Objects: pairs `x : E₁` and y : E₂`
 - Morphisms from `(x₁ ,, y₁)` to `(x₂ ,, y₂)` are given by
 ```
 E₁ ⦃ x₁ , x₂ ⦄ ⊗ E₂ ⦃ y₁ , y₂ ⦄
 ```
 To guarantee that the composition can be defined, we need to assume that `V` is
 symmetric.

 In our setting, we would like the construction to be compatible with univalence.
 As such, the isomorphisms are determined: by univalence, isomorphisms from
 `(x₁ ,, y₁)` to `(x₂ ,, y₂)` should be the same as pairs of isomorphisms from
 `x₁` to `x₂` and `y₁` to `y₂`. For that reason, we would like the morphisms in
 the product to be pairs of morphisms in `E₁` and in `E₂`.

 This is not the case in general for arbitrary monoidal categories. For example,
 if we look at the category of abelian groups with the tensor product, then
 morphisms in the product are not necessarily pairs of morphisms. For that reason,
 we assume that `V` is cartesian, which is sufficient to guarantee that the
 morphisms in the product are pairs of morphisms.

 *********************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.

Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Cartesian.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.
Import MonoidalNotations.

Section ProductEnrichment.
  Context (V : monoidal_cat)
          (HV : is_cartesian V)
          {C₁ C₂ : category}
          (E₁ : enrichment C₁ V)
          (E₂ : enrichment C₂ V).

  Definition product_enrichment_hom
             (x₁ y₁ : C₁)
             (x₂ y₂ : C₂)
    : V
    := (E₁ ⦃ x₁ , y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂ , y₂ ⦄).

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁: C₁
x₂: C₂
V ⟦ I_{ V}, product_enrichment_hom x₁ x₁ x₂ x₂ ⟧

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁: C₁
x₂: C₂
V ⟦ I_{ V}, product_enrichment_hom x₁ x₁ x₂ x₂ ⟧

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁: C₁
x₂: C₂
V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁: C₁
x₂: C₂
V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₂ ⦄ ⟧

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁: C₁
x₂: C₂
V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
 exact (enriched_id E₁ x₁).
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁: C₁
x₂: C₂
V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
 exact (enriched_id E₂ x₂).
  Defined.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁: C₁
x₂: C₂
product_enrichment_id x₁ x₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₂ ⦄) = enriched_id E₁ x₁

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁: C₁
x₂: C₂
product_enrichment_id x₁ x₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₂ ⦄) = enriched_id E₁ x₁

    apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁: C₁
x₂: C₂
product_enrichment_id x₁ x₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₂ ⦄) = enriched_id E₂ x₂

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁: C₁
x₂: C₂
product_enrichment_id x₁ x₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₂ ⦄) = enriched_id E₂ x₂

    apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂,
(E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⟧

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂,
(E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⟧

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂, E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄
⟧
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂, E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄
⟧

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂, E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄
⟧
 exact (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV _ _ · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV _ _).
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂, E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄
⟧
 exact (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV _ _ · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV _ _).
  Defined.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄))
  (product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄))
  (product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)

    apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)

    apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂,
(E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) ⟧

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂,
(E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) ⟧

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂, E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄
⟧
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂, E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄
⟧

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂, E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄
⟧
 exact (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV _ _ · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV _ _).
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂, E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄
⟧
 exact (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV _ _ · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV _ _).
  Defined.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄))
  (product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄))
  (product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)

    apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)

product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)

    apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).

  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂,
product_enrichment_hom x₁ z₁ x₂ z₂ ⟧

product_enrichment_hom x₁ z₁ x₂ z₂ ⟧

V

  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂, E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄

  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂, E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄
⟧
 exact (product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂ · enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁).
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂, E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄
⟧
 exact (product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂ · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂).
  Defined.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄) =
product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄) =
product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁

    apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄) =
product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄) =
product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂

    apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
  Qed.

g: C₂ ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
V ⟦ I_{ V}, product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂ ⟧

HV: is_cartesian V

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁: C₁
x₂, y₂: C₂
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
 exact (enriched_from_arr E₁ f).
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁: C₁
x₂, y₂: C₂
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
 exact (enriched_from_arr E₂ g).
  Defined.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁: C₁
x₂, y₂: C₂
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
product_enrichment_from_arr f g
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) = enriched_from_arr E₁ f

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁: C₁
x₂, y₂: C₂
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
product_enrichment_from_arr f g
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) = enriched_from_arr E₁ f

    apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁: C₁
x₂, y₂: C₂
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
product_enrichment_from_arr f g
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) = enriched_from_arr E₂ g

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x₁, y₁: C₁
x₂, y₂: C₂
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
g: C₂ ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
product_enrichment_from_arr f g
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) = enriched_from_arr E₂ g

    apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
  Qed.

  Definition product_enrichment_to_arr
             {x₁ y₁ : C₁}
             {x₂ y₂ : C₂}
             (fg : I_{V} --> product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
    : (x₁ --> y₁) × (x₂ --> y₂)
    := enriched_to_arr E₁ (fg · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV _ _)
       ,,
       enriched_to_arr E₂ (fg · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV _ _).

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂,
(E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⟧

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂,
(E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⟧

HV: is_cartesian V

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂, E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄
⟧

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂, E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄
⟧

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂, E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄
⟧
 exact (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV _ _
             · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV _ _
             · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV _ _).
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂, E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄
⟧
 exact (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV _ _
             · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV _ _
             · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV _ _).
  Defined.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂,
(E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) ⟧

⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂,
(E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) ⟧

⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂,
(E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⟧

HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂, E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄
⟧

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂,
(E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⟧
 apply triple_pr1_pr1.
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂, E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄
⟧
 exact (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV _ _ · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV _ _).
  Defined.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp w₁ x₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ z₂ =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp w₁ x₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ z₂ =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp w₁ x₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp w₁ x₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp w₁ x₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_pr1_comp w₁ x₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ z₂
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)) =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)) =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄))
    (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄) =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄) =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)) =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
   · enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁) =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
   · enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
?b =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
   · enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)) = ?b

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) = ?t2

        apply cartesian_tensor_pr1.
      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄))
     (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) · enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
   · enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄))
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) · enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁

· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄))
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV

   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂

· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄))
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) = ?b

   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂

· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄))
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) = ?b

        apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr1_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂ =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)

triple_pr1_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)

· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)

semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄))
    (product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄) =

   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)

· product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄))

        apply idpath.

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
?b =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr1_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) = ?b

          apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)))
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)))
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_pr1_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)))
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))

        apply idpath.
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp w₁ x₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_pr1_comp w₁ x₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ z₂
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)) =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom x₁ z₁ x₂ z₂)
     ((E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)) =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom x₁ z₁ x₂ z₂)
    ((E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)) =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) =
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
?b =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)) = ?b

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
enriched_comp E₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) = ?t2

        apply cartesian_tensor_pr2.
      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄))
     (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) · identity (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄))
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄))
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
?b =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄))
    (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) = ?b

        apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  ((E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂,
(E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) ⟧

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂,
(E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) ⟧

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂, E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄
⟧
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂, E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄
⟧

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂, E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄
⟧
 exact (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV _ _
             · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV _ _
             · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV _ _).

⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂, E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄
⟧
 exact (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV _ _
             · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV _ _
             · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV _ _).
  Defined.

⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂,
(E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) ⟧

  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂

  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂,

V: monoidal_cat

⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁

V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂,
(E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) ⟧
 apply triple_pr2_pr1.
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
V
⟦ product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂
  ⊗ product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂, E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄
⟧
 exact (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV _ _ · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV _ _).
  Defined.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp w₁ x₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ z₂ =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp w₁ x₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ z₂ =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp w₁ x₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp w₁ x₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp w₁ x₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_pr2_comp w₁ x₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ z₂
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)) =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)) =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄))
    (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄) =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄) =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)) =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
   · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂) =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
   · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
?b =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
   · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)) = ?b

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) = ?t2

        apply cartesian_tensor_pr1.
      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
     (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
   · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂ =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) = ?b

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

?b =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) = ?b

        apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).

semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)

triple_pr2_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄))
    (product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ y₁, z₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄))

        apply idpath.

HV: is_cartesian V

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr2_pr1 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)))
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)))
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_pr2_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)))
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂)
     ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ x₁, y₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))

        apply idpath.
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp w₁ x₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (product_enrichment_pr2_comp w₁ x₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ z₂
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)) =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom x₁ z₁ x₂ z₂)
     ((E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)) =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
product_enrichment_comp x₁ y₁ z₁ x₂ y₂ z₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom x₁ z₁ x₂ z₂)
    ((E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· (identity (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)) =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) =
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
?b =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)) = ?b

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
enriched_comp E₂ x₂ y₂ z₂ #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, z₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) = ?t2

        apply cartesian_tensor_pr2.
      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
     (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) · identity (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
?b =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
triple_pr2 w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ w₂ x₂ y₂ z₂
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, z₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y₂ ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) = ?b

        apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w₁, x₁, y₁, z₁: C₁
w₂, x₂, y₂, z₂: C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  ((E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom y₁ z₁ y₂ z₂
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂)
  (product_enrichment_hom w₁ x₁ w₂ x₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ w₁, x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ w₂, x₂ ⦄)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

→ category_binproduct C₁ C₂ → V

V ⟦ I_{ V}, ?pr1 x x ⟧

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
(λ _ : ∏ x y : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
       category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
       → V ⟦ I_{ V}, ?pr1 x y ⟧,
 ∏ x y : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
 V ⟦ I_{ V}, ?pr1 x y ⟧
 → category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧) ?pr12

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
category_binproduct C₁ C₂
→ category_binproduct C₁ C₂ → V
 exact (λ xy₁ xy₂, product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)).
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ x : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
V ⟦ I_{ V},
(λ xy₁ xy₂ : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
 product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁)
   (pr2 xy₂)) x x ⟧
 exact (λ xy, product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)).
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ x y z : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
V
⟦ (λ xy₁ xy₂ : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
   product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) y z
  ⊗ (λ xy₁ xy₂ : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
     product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
       (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) x y,
(λ xy₁ xy₂ : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
 product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁)
   (pr2 xy₂)) x z ⟧
 exact (λ xy₁ xy₂ xy₃, product_enrichment_comp _ _ _ _ _ _).
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ x y : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
→ V ⟦ I_{ V},
  (λ xy₁ xy₂ : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
   product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) x y ⟧
 exact (λ xy₁ xy₂ fg, product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 fg) (pr2 fg)).
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
(λ _ : ∏ x y : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
       category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
       → V ⟦ I_{ V},
         (λ xy₁ xy₂ : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
          product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
            (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) x y ⟧,
 ∏ x y : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
 V ⟦ I_{ V},
 (λ xy₁ xy₂ : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
  product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁)
    (pr2 xy₂)) x y ⟧
 → category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
  (λ (xy₁ xy₂ : category_binproduct C₁ C₂)
   (fg : category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ xy₁, xy₂ ⟧),
   product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 fg) (pr2 fg))
 exact (λ xy₁ xy₂ fg, product_enrichment_to_arr fg).
  Defined.

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
enrichment_laws product_enrichment_data

  
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
enrichment_laws product_enrichment_data

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ x y : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
mon_lunitor (product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
enriched_id product_enrichment_data y
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data x y y
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ x y : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
mon_runitor (product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id product_enrichment_data x
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data x x y
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ w x y z : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
enriched_comp product_enrichment_data x y z
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data w x z =
mon_lassociator (product_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  (product_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp product_enrichment_data w x y
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data w y z
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ (x y : category_binproduct C₁ C₂)
(f : category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_to_arr product_enrichment_data
  (enriched_from_arr product_enrichment_data f) = f
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ (x y : category_binproduct C₁ C₂)
(f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧),
enriched_from_arr product_enrichment_data
  (enriched_to_arr product_enrichment_data f) = f
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ x : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
enriched_to_arr product_enrichment_data
  (enriched_id product_enrichment_data x) = identity x
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ (x y z : category_binproduct C₁ C₂)
(f : category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · g =
enriched_to_arr product_enrichment_data
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr product_enrichment_data g
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr product_enrichment_data f
   · enriched_comp product_enrichment_data x y z)

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ x y : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
mon_lunitor (product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
enriched_id product_enrichment_data y
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data x y y
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lunitor (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄) =
enriched_id product_enrichment_data xy₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data xy₁ xy₂ xy₂

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lunitor (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
· BinProductPr1 V
    (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
enriched_id product_enrichment_data xy₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data xy₁ xy₂ xy₂
· BinProductPr1 V
    (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lunitor (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
· BinProductPr2 V
    (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
enriched_id product_enrichment_data xy₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data xy₁ xy₂ xy₂
· BinProductPr2 V
    (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lunitor (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
· BinProductPr1 V
    (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
enriched_id product_enrichment_data xy₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data xy₁ xy₂ xy₂
· BinProductPr1 V
    (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lunitor
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂) (pr1 xy₂)) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂) (pr1 xy₂)) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (product_enrichment_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂) (pr1 xy₂)) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
   · enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂) (pr1 xy₂))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂) (pr1 xy₂) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
· enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂) (pr1 xy₂)

     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄) =

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)) =

· (product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)

   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
