V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)) = ?b

            
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄) = ?t2

            apply cartesian_tensor_pr1.
          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V}
     (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₂)) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V}
     (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₂))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
       (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V}
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
· enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₂)

· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) = ?b

       (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) = ?y'

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂

  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V}
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
· enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₂)

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V}
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) =
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V}
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V}
  ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) · identity I_{ V}

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V}
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V}
  ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

          apply idpath.
        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄))

     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₂)

       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)) =

       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

?b =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₂) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂))

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂

     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
     (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))

     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₂) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂))
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₂) (pr1 xy₂)
       (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂))
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₂) (pr1 xy₂)
       (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂))
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₂) (pr1 xy₂)
       (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂))
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) = ?b

            
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₂) (pr1 xy₂)
       (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂))
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) = ?y'

            apply cartesian_tensor_pr2.
          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
       (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
  ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

          apply idpath.
      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lunitor (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
· BinProductPr2 V
    (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
enriched_id product_enrichment_data xy₂
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data xy₁ xy₂ xy₂
· BinProductPr2 V
    (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lunitor
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· mon_lunitor (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (product_enrichment_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)

    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) = ?b

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) = ?t2

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V}
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)

· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V}
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂))

· enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂

  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₂, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)

    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)

semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V}
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V}
  ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) · identity I_{ V}

     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V}

   ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

· (enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₂) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂))
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₂) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂))
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

HV: is_cartesian V

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₂, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) = ?t2

            apply cartesian_tensor_pr2.
          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₂) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂))
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =

HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₂) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₂) (pr2 xy₂))
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
       (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V}
  ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

          apply idpath.
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ x y : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
mon_runitor (product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id product_enrichment_data x
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data x x y
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_runitor (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄) =
identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id product_enrichment_data xy₁
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data xy₁ xy₁ xy₂

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_runitor (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
· BinProductPr1 V
    (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id product_enrichment_data xy₁
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data xy₁ xy₁ xy₂
· BinProductPr1 V
    (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_runitor (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
· BinProductPr2 V
    (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id product_enrichment_data xy₁
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data xy₁ xy₁ xy₂
· BinProductPr2 V
    (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_runitor (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
· BinProductPr1 V
    (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id product_enrichment_data xy₁
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data xy₁ xy₁ xy₂
· BinProductPr1 V
    (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_runitor
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)
   · enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)
   · enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (product_enrichment_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
     (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)
   · enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
     (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)
   · enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂))

HV: is_cartesian V

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)
· enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)
· enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄) =

· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)

  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

HV: is_cartesian V

· (identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)) = ?b

            
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄) = ?t2

            apply cartesian_tensor_pr1.
          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     I_{ V} · identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     I_{ V} · identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄))

HV: is_cartesian V

identity

     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
       (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    I_{ V} · identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)

HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)

    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)

· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) = ?b

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

?b =

  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}

    I_{ V} · identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)

#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)

· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)

  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) I_{ V}
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
       (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    I_{ V} · identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) I_{ V}
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     I_{ V} · identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) I_{ V}
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    I_{ V}

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) I_{ V}
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) I_{ V}
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

          apply idpath.
        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
     (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)) = ?b

            
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄) = ?t2

            apply cartesian_tensor_pr2.
          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     I_{ V} · enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    I_{ V} · enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
       (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
     ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) I_{ V}
· identity I_{ V} · enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) I_{ V}
· product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) I_{ V}
· enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) I_{ V}
· product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) I_{ V}
· enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) I_{ V}
· (product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄) =
enriched_id E₁ (pr1 xy₁)

          apply product_enrichment_id_pr1.
      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_runitor (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
· BinProductPr2 V
    (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ xy₁, xy₂ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id product_enrichment_data xy₁
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data xy₁ xy₁ xy₂
· BinProductPr2 V
    (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_runitor
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (product_enrichment_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
     (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
     (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)

· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄) =

    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)

  #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)

    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄) =

     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
     (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

HV: is_cartesian V

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)) = ?b

            
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄) = ?t2

            apply cartesian_tensor_pr1.
          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
     I_{ V} · identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
     I_{ V} · identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
       (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
    I_{ V} · identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
       (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
    I_{ V} · identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
       (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) = ?b

            
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
     ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
       (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)) = ?y'

            apply cartesian_tensor_pr1.
          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) I_{ V}
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
       (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
    I_{ V} · identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) I_{ V}
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
     I_{ V} · identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) I_{ V}
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
    I_{ V}

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) I_{ V}
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) I_{ V}
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)

          apply idpath.
        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
    (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₁)
     (pr1 xy₂) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)) = ?b

            
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄) = ?t2

            apply cartesian_tensor_pr2.
          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
     I_{ V} · enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
        (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)
    I_{ V} · enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁) =
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
#⊗ product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
       (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂))
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
     ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) I_{ V}
· identity I_{ V} · enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) I_{ V}
· product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) I_{ V}
· enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) I_{ V}
· product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₂ ⦄)) I_{ V}
· enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 xy₂)
     (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 xy₂)) I_{ V}
· (product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁) =
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
xy₁, xy₂: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
product_enrichment_id (pr1 xy₁) (pr2 xy₁)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy₁, pr1 xy₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 xy₁, pr2 xy₁ ⦄) =
enriched_id E₂ (pr2 xy₁)

          apply product_enrichment_id_pr2.
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ w x y z : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
enriched_comp product_enrichment_data x y z
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data w x z =
mon_lassociator (product_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  (product_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp product_enrichment_data w x y
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data w y z
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
enriched_comp product_enrichment_data x y z
#⊗ identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data w x z =
mon_lassociator (product_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  (product_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (product_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp product_enrichment_data w x y
· enriched_comp product_enrichment_data w y z

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
        (pr2 x))
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 z ⦄) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
  #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
       (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 z ⦄)
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
        (pr2 x))
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 z ⦄) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
  #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
       (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 z ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
        (pr2 x))
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 z ⦄) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
  #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
       (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 z ⦄)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
        (pr2 x))
· (product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 z)
     (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 z)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 z ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 z ⦄)) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
          (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 z ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 z ⦄)))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
        (pr2 x))
· (product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 z)
     (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 z)
   · enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 z)) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y)
        (pr1 z) (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
      · enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
        (pr2 x))
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 z)
· enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 z) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
  #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
       (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr1 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 z) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
  #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
       (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr1 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄)
