     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
  #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
       (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
  #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
       (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
  #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
       (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄)
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
  #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
       (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
  #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
       (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
      #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄))) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y)
        (pr1 z) (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
      #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄))) =
?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y)
        (pr1 z) (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
      #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄))) =
?b

            
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄) = ?t2

            apply cartesian_tensor_pr1.
          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y)
        (pr1 z) (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
       ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y)
        (pr1 z) (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y)
        (pr1 z) (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
        ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))
        (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 y)
           (pr2 w) (pr2 y))
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
        ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))
        (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 y)
           (pr2 w) (pr2 y))
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
        ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))
        (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 y)
           (pr2 w) (pr2 y))
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))

HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
        ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))

      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))) = ?b

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
#⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
     (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr2 w)
        (pr2 y))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)) = ?t2

HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
#⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
     (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr2 w)
       (pr2 y))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) = ?t2

            
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
#⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
     (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr2 w)
       (pr2 y)) = ?y'

            apply cartesian_tensor_pr1.
          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y)
      ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
          (pr2 x))
   · identity
       (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
          (pr2 z))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y)
      ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
          (pr2 x))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y)
     ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
         (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) = ?b

            
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) = ?y'

            apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2_pr1 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)

          apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
  #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
       (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
      #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄))) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y)
        (pr1 z) (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
      #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄))) =
?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y)
        (pr1 z) (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
      #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄))) =
?b

            
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄) = ?t2

            apply cartesian_tensor_pr2.
          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))
      · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 y)
        (pr1 z) (pr2 w) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))
      · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))) =
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
        (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
           (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
        ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄))
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
        (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
           (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
        ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄))
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄))) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))
      · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
        (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
           (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
        ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄))
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄))) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))
      · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
   #⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
        (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
           (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
        ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄))
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄))) = ?b

            
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
#⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
     (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 y ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄)) = ?t2

            
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
#⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
     (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄) = ?t2

            
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
identity
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
#⊗ product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
     (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄)) =
?y'

            apply cartesian_tensor_pr2.
          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y)
      ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
          (pr2 x))
   · product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
       (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 y ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄)) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))
      · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y)
      ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
          (pr2 x))
   · (product_enrichment_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 y ⦄))) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))
      · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y)
      ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
          (pr2 x))
   · (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x)
        (pr1 y) (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))
      · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y)
     ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
         (pr2 x))
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
    (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y)
     ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
         (pr2 x))
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
    (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y)
      ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
          (pr2 x))
   · product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x)
       (pr1 y) (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
       ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y)
      ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
          (pr2 x))
   · product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x)
       (pr1 y) (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y)
      ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
          (pr2 x))
   · product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x)
       (pr1 y) (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y)
      ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
          (pr2 x))
   · product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x)
       (pr1 y) (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y)
      ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
          (pr2 x))
   · product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x)
       (pr1 y) (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y)
      ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
          (pr2 x))
   · (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x)
        (pr1 y) (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y)
      ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
          (pr2 x))
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
        ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
        (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x)
           (pr2 w) (pr2 x))
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y)
     ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
         (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
       (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
        (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
       (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)) =
?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)) =
?b

               
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) = ?t2

               apply cartesian_tensor_pr1.
             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)

· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) = ?y'

               apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2_pr1 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)

             apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y)
      ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
          (pr2 x))
   · product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x)
       (pr1 y) (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y)
      ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
          (pr2 x))
   · (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 w) (pr1 x)
        (pr1 y) (pr2 w) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y)
      ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
          (pr2 x))
   · (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
        (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
           (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
        ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
mon_lassociator
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y)
     ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
         (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
     (pr2 y))
#⊗ identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
        (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
       (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) =
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
       (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
        (pr2 x))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)) =
?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
        (pr2 x))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)) =
?b

               
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) = ?t2

               apply cartesian_tensor_pr2.
             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
     (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· (identity
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
        (pr2 x))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
       (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
?b =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
       (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) = ?b

               
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
triple_pr2 (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 w)
  (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) = ?y'

               apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ (is_cartesian_BinProduct HV _ _)).
             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· identity
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
       (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)

             
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
     (pr2 z)
   ⊗ product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
  (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 w) (pr1 x) (pr2 w)
     (pr2 x))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 w, pr1 x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 w, pr2 x ⦄)

             apply idpath.
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ (x y : category_binproduct C₁ C₂)
(f : category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_to_arr product_enrichment_data
  (enriched_from_arr product_enrichment_data f) = f
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
product_enrichment_to_arr
  (product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)) = f

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_to_arr E₁
  (product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)) = pr1 f
V: monoidal_cat

f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_to_arr E₂
  (product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)) = pr2 f

   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)) = pr1 f

HV: is_cartesian V

x, y: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧

        apply idpath.
      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category

   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)) = pr2 f
