V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ (x y : category_binproduct C₁ C₂)
(f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧),
enriched_from_arr product_enrichment_data
  (enriched_to_arr product_enrichment_data f) = f
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
product_enrichment_from_arr
  (enriched_to_arr E₁
     (f
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)))
  (enriched_to_arr E₂
     (f
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))) = f

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
product_enrichment_from_arr
  (enriched_to_arr E₁
     (f
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)))
  (enriched_to_arr E₂
     (f
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
f
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
product_enrichment_from_arr
  (enriched_to_arr E₁
     (f
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)))
  (enriched_to_arr E₂
     (f
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
f
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
product_enrichment_from_arr
  (enriched_to_arr E₁
     (f
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)))
  (enriched_to_arr E₂
     (f
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
f
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁
  (enriched_to_arr E₁
     (f
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))) =
f
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)

        apply enriched_from_to_arr.
      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
product_enrichment_from_arr
  (enriched_to_arr E₁
     (f
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)))
  (enriched_to_arr E₂
     (f
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
f
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, product_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂
  (enriched_to_arr E₂
     (f
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))) =
f
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)

        apply enriched_from_to_arr.
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ x : category_binproduct C₁ C₂,
enriched_to_arr product_enrichment_data
  (enriched_id product_enrichment_data x) = identity x
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
product_enrichment_to_arr
  (product_enrichment_id (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
make_dirprod (identity (pr1 x)) (identity (pr2 x))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
enriched_to_arr E₁
  (product_enrichment_id (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 x ⦄)) = identity (pr1 x)
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
enriched_to_arr E₂
  (product_enrichment_id (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 x ⦄)) = identity (pr2 x)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
enriched_to_arr E₁
  (product_enrichment_id (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 x ⦄)) = identity (pr1 x)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
enriched_to_arr E₁ (enriched_id E₁ (pr1 x)) =
identity (pr1 x)

        apply enriched_to_arr_id.
      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
enriched_to_arr E₂
  (product_enrichment_id (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 x ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 x ⦄)) = identity (pr2 x)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
enriched_to_arr E₂ (enriched_id E₂ (pr2 x)) =
identity (pr2 x)

        apply enriched_to_arr_id.
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ (x y z : category_binproduct C₁ C₂)
(f : category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · g =
enriched_to_arr product_enrichment_data
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr product_enrichment_data g
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr product_enrichment_data f
   · enriched_comp product_enrichment_data x y z)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
make_dirprod (pr1 f · pr1 g) (pr2 f · pr2 g) =
product_enrichment_to_arr
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
     #⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
   · product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
       (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1 f · pr1 g =
enriched_to_arr E₁
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
     #⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
   · product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
       (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 z ⦄))
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr2 f · pr2 g =
enriched_to_arr E₂
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
     #⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
   · product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
       (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 z ⦄))

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1 f · pr1 g =
enriched_to_arr E₁
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
     #⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
   · product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
       (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 z ⦄))
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_to_arr E₁
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
   · enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)) =
enriched_to_arr E₁
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
     #⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
   · product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
       (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 z ⦄))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
  #⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 z ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
   · enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
   #⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
   · (product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
        (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 z ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 z ⦄)))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· (product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
     (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 z ⦄))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· (product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
     (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
   · enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· enriched_comp E₁ (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· (product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
     (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V} I_{ V}
· product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V} I_{ V}
· (product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V} I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V} I_{ V}
· (product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)

          apply product_enrichment_from_arr_pr1.
        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· (product_enrichment_pr1_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
     (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V} I_{ V}
· product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V} I_{ V}
· (product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V} I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V} I_{ V}
· (product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr1 f)

          apply product_enrichment_from_arr_pr1.
      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr2 f · pr2 g =
enriched_to_arr E₂
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
     #⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
   · product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
       (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 z ⦄))
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_to_arr E₂
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)) =
enriched_to_arr E₂
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
     #⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
   · product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
       (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 z ⦄))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
  #⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 z ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
   #⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
   · (product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
        (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
      · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 z ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 z ⦄)))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· (product_enrichment_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
     (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 z ⦄))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
     (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z))

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)

        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)

g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)

· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x)
       (pr2 y))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V} I_{ V}
· product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr1 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V} I_{ V}
· (product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V} I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr1 HV I_{ V} I_{ V}
· (product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 y, pr1 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)

          apply product_enrichment_from_arr_pr2.
        
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
    (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· (product_enrichment_pr2_comp (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
     (pr2 x) (pr2 y) (pr2 z)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· (semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
     (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
        (pr2 z))
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
#⊗ product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV
    (product_enrichment_hom (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y)
       (pr2 z))
    ((E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V} I_{ V}
· product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 (pr1 HV) (E₂ ⦃ pr2 y, pr2 z ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V} I_{ V}
· (product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V} I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f) =
semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV I_{ V} I_{ V}
· (product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
   · semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄))

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f) =
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_cartesian V
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
x, y, z: category_binproduct C₁ C₂
f: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct C₁ C₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
product_enrichment_from_arr (pr1 f) (pr2 f)
· semi_cart_tensor_pr2 HV (E₁ ⦃ pr1 x, pr1 y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr2 x, pr2 y ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr2 f)

          apply product_enrichment_from_arr_pr2.
  Qed.

  Definition product_enrichment
    : enrichment (category_binproduct C₁ C₂) V
    := product_enrichment_data ,, product_enrichment_laws.
End ProductEnrichment.
